item.title: 无人机袭击破坏阿联酋和巴林的亚马逊数据中心
item.description: 亚马逊公司云计算部门近日披露，其位于中东的三处数据中心近日遭无人机袭击损毁，并警告称相关服务将面临长期中断。【原文：Amazon.com Inc.’s cloud unit warned of prolonged disruptions to its services after revealing that drone strikes damaged three of its data centers in the Middle East in recent days.】

item.title: 中国投资者持续买入香港股票，ETF资金流入激增
item.description: 尽管香港股市在亚洲表现不佳，内地投资者仍持续买入，伺机逢低买入。【原文：Chinese mainland investors persist in buying Hong Kong stocks, despite their underperformance in Asia, chasing dip-buying opportunities.】

item.title: 失去领导者的伊朗对市场依然构成威胁
item.description:
迄今为止，针对特朗普2.0的行动尚未出现任何重大军事报复行动。

【原文：

Until now, there had been no significant military reprisals to Trump 2.0’s actions.

】

item.title: 新加坡人工智能计划包括培训律师和监狱囚犯
item.description: 新加坡正致力于提升劳动力素质，通过为律师、会计师乃至囚犯配备人工智能技能来实现这一目标。【原文：Singapore is on a quest to uplift its workforce by equipping lawyers, accountants and even prisoners with artificial intelligence skills.】

item.title: 日本十年期国债发售保持平稳，地缘政治局势动荡不安
item.description: 日本十年期国债拍卖需求稳定，为市场带来些许宽慰。随着中东冲突不断升级，全球市场通胀担忧再度升温。【原文：Japan’s 10-year government bond auction drew steady demand, offering some relief as a widening conflict in the Middle East revives inflation concerns across global markets.】

item.title: 中国贸易额在伊朗战争冲击前正创历史新高
item.description: 在美以对伊朗发动袭击前的数周内，中国贸易额已飙升至超越去年创纪录水平的高度。随着军事冲突范围扩大，全球贸易恐将面临新一轮冲击。【原文：China’s trade volumes soared above last year’s record-setting levels in the weeks before US and Israeli strikes hit Iran, as a widening military conflict risks causing a new disruption to global commerce.】

item.title: 马科斯称菲律宾石油储备充足，冲突动荡市场
item.description: 菲律宾总统小费迪南德·马科斯表示，随着中东冲突加剧供应中断担忧，该国拥有充足的石油储备。【原文：Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. said his country has ample stockpiles of oil as the conflict in the Middle East raises fears of supply disruptions.】

item.title: 马来西亚国家石油公司目前未见中东冲突造成业务中断
item.description: 马来西亚能源巨头国家石油公司表示，尽管目前尚未对其运营造成直接影响，但该公司正密切关注中东地区的冲突局势。【原文：Malaysian energy giant Petroliam Nasional Bhd. said it is closely monitoring the conflict in the Middle East even though it has seen no direct impact on its operations so far.】

item.title: 新加坡携手摩根大通、瑞银推进区域黄金枢纽建设
item.description: 新加坡正加大力度打造区域黄金中心，借助包括摩根大通和瑞银集团在内的本地及国际银行，以提升市场流动性，充分满足富裕投资者的需求。【原文：Singapore is cranking up efforts to turn itself into a regional gold hub, tapping local and international banks including JPMorgan Chase & Co. and UBS Group AG to help boost liquidity and make the most of demand from wealthy investors.】

item.title: 调查显示，伊朗战争将推高全球通胀率
item.description: 彭博新闻社对经济学家进行的一项全球调查显示，由于与伊朗的战争，全球通胀率预计将上升，但经济增长前景目前基本不受影响。【原文：Inflation around the world is seen picking up due to the war with Iran, while growth prospects remain largely unaffected for now, according to a global survey of economists by Bloomberg News.】

item.title: 中国AI上市热潮令投资者陷入盲目投资
item.description: 中国人工智能企业密集登陆股市，导致分析师覆盖出现缺口，券商们正努力跟上这些公司惊人上市速度的步伐。【原文：A flurry of stock market listings by Chinese artificial intelligence companies has opened up a gap in analyst coverage as brokerages struggle to keep up with the breakneck pace of the debuts.】

item.title: 全球债券岌岌可危，伊朗战争重燃通胀威胁
item.description: 伊朗战争正重新点燃金融市场的通胀担忧，削弱了全球债券的前景——这些债券刚刚创下疫情以来最佳的年度开局。【原文：The Iran war is rekindling inflation concerns across financial markets, sapping the outlook for global bonds that had just posted their best start to a year since the pandemic.】

item.title: 亚洲股市延续跌势，中东局势持续紧张
item.description: 亚洲股市连续第二日下跌，中东冲突升级加剧了投资者对油价飙升和通胀压力的担忧。【原文：Asian stocks fell for a second day, as an escalation in the Middle East conflict fueled investor concern about surging oil prices and inflationary pressures.】

item.title: 韩国股市重开后因伊朗风险暴跌
item.description: 受中东局势紧张加剧对能源成本上涨影响的担忧影响，韩国股市大幅下挫，避险情绪席卷全球市场。【原文：South Korean stocks slumped as Middle East tensions stoked concern over the impact of rising energy costs, with risk-off sentiment sweeping across global markets.】

item.title: 人民币汇率创十个月最大涨幅，因央行加强汇率定价机制
item.description: 在人民代表大会召开前夕，中国人民银行通过每日参考汇率释放出对人民币升值持容忍态度的信号，人民币汇率应声走高。【原文：The yuan rallied after the People’s Bank of China signaled its comfort with the currency’s appreciation via its daily reference rate, ahead of the National People’s Congress.】

item.title: 伊朗局势动荡冲击全球供应，铝价延续涨势
item.description: 铝价小幅上涨，因美国总统特朗普暗示对伊朗的军事行动可能持续数周，这加剧了中东地区铝出口面临更大中断风险的可能性。【原文：Aluminum edged up after US President Donald Trump suggested the military campaign against Iran could last weeks, raising the risk of deeper disruptions to exports of the metal from the Middle East.】

item.title: 参议员怀登誓言就五角大楼禁止人类学研究展开斗争
item.description: 国会民主党人誓言要挑战特朗普政府针对人工智能巨头Anthropic PBC公司采取的史无前例的行动，这些行动包括禁止联邦政府及五角大楼承包商使用该公司的所有产品。【原文：Congressional Democrats are vowing to contest the Trump administration’s unprecedented actions against the artificial intelligence giant Anthropic PBC, which include a prohibition on all use in the federal government and by Pentagon contractors.】

item.title: Meta测试AI购物研究工具，旨在与ChatGPT、Gemini竞争
item.description: Meta Platforms公司正在其人工智能聊天机器人中测试一项购物研究功能，该功能与OpenAI的ChatGPT和谷歌的Gemini提供的类似工具形成竞争。【原文：Meta Platforms Inc. is testing a shopping research feature in its artificial intelligence chatbot, rivaling a similar tool offered by OpenAI’s ChatGPT and Google’s Gemini.】

item.title: 日本外相片山秀一警告外汇风险，中东局势拖累日元
item.description: 日本财务大臣片山萨季表示，日本正以最高警惕监控金融市场，并将针对剧烈波动采取必要应对措施。此前美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击后，市场波动性持续加剧。【原文：Japan is monitoring financial markets with the utmost vigilance and will take any necessary action in response to sharp movements, Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama said, as volatility intensifies following the US and Israeli attack on Iran.】

item.title: OpenAI创始人山姆·奥尔特曼称五角大楼合作协议“草率”
item.description: OpenAI首席执行官山姆·奥尔特曼表示，该公司急于与国防部达成协议——此前五角大楼与竞争对手Anthropic PBC发生冲突——显得"机会主义且草率"。【原文：OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman said that the company’s rush to forge a deal with the Defense Department — following a clash between the Pentagon and rival Anthropic PBC — looked “opportunistic and sloppy.”】

item.title: 卡塔尔液化天然气供应中断推升燃料转换需求，煤炭价格应声上涨
item.description: 电厂煤炭价格创三年来最大涨幅，因卡塔尔液化天然气工厂史无前例的停产迫使电力行业加速燃料转换。【原文：Power-station coal prices jumped the most in three years as an unprecedented shutdown of Qatar’s liquefied natural gas plant raised the needs for fuel-switching in the electricity sector.】

item.title: 中东动荡中亚洲银行数十亿美元海湾贷款面临风险
item.description: 亚洲银行向中东地区提供的数十亿美元贷款激增，正面临日益加剧的不确定性，因为伊朗冲突的升级加剧了更广泛金融冲击的风险。【原文：The multibillion dollar ramp-up in loans by Asian banks to the Middle East faces growing uncertainty as Iran’s escalating conflict raises the risk of broader financial fallout.】

item.title: 霍华德·马克斯称：战争决策切勿被情绪蒙蔽
item.description: 橡树资本管理公司联合创始人霍华德·马克斯表示，投资者在制定风险敞口决策时，需避免受中东冲突情绪影响而冲动行事。【原文：Oaktree Capital Management LP co-founder Howard Marks said investors need to avoid letting their emotions run high when making decisions on exposure due to the Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 特朗普对伊朗开战令交易员直面能源危机
item.description:
油价有限度的飙升表明交易员押注冲突将短暂结束。若供应中断持续，恐将引发市场全面混乱。

【原文：

Limited oil price surges signal that traders are betting on a short conflict. A lengthy disruption threatens to cause chaos across markets.

】

item.title: Anthropic凭借记忆功能试图从ChatGPT手中争夺用户
item.description: Anthropic旗下的人工智能聊天机器人Claude将为免费用户提供跨对话上下文记忆功能，该公司正试图留住近日创造"前所未有需求"的新用户群体。【原文：Anthropic PBC’s artificial intelligence chatbot Claude will be able to recall context across conversations for free users, as the company seeks to hang on to new consumers who have created “unprecedented demand” the past few days.】

item.title: 托马斯·布拉沃即将达成收购WWEX集团的交易，将打造市值120亿美元的航运科技公司
item.description: 知情人士透露，私募股权公司托马斯·布拉沃正就收购第三方物流服务商WWEX集团展开深入谈判，此举旨在打造一家价值高达120亿美元的航运科技企业。【原文：Thoma Bravo is in advanced talks to acquire third-party logistics provider WWEX Group Inc., according to people familiar with the matter, as part of a plan to create a shipping technology business worth as much as $12 billion.】

item.title: 里夫斯聚焦英国生活成本与经济增长，应对"充满不确定性的世界"
item.description: 财政大臣瑞秋·里夫斯将在周二的经济声明中哀叹世界正被不确定性所淹没。她将尽量避免助长这种不确定性——通过尽可能少地发言。【原文：Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves will use her economic statement on Tuesday to lament that the world is awash with uncertainty. And she’ll try not to contribute any more of it — by saying as little as possible.】

item.title: 23岁创始人推出的家政服务应用估值突破1亿美元
item.description: 家政服务应用Pronto以1亿美元估值完成融资，凸显印度快速壮大的中产阶级对烹饪、清洁等服务日益增长的需求。【原文：Household-help app Pronto raised funding at a $100 million valuation, underscoring rising demand for services such as cooking and cleaning from India’s rapidly expanding middle class.】

item.title: 日本企业加大支出力度，高市早苗推动投资
item.description: 日本最大型企业去年第四季度增加了资本支出，表明企业信心增强。此前首相高市早苗推动在战略领域加大投资力度。【原文：Japan’s biggest companies increased capital spending in the final quarter of last year, indicating firmer corporate sentiment as Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi pushes for more investment in strategic sectors.】

item.title: 麦哲伦股份因收购巴伦乔伊达成协议，股价创2006年以来最大涨幅
item.description: 麦哲伦金融集团股价创下近20年来最大涨幅，此前这家澳大利亚资产管理公司同意以约16亿澳元（11亿美元）收购巴伦乔伊资本合伙公司。【原文：Magellan Financial Group Ltd. shares surged the most in about 20 years after the Australian asset manager agreed to buy Barrenjoey Capital Partners in a deal valued at about A$1.6 billion ($1.1 billion).】
